replies_today.reply: Personality traits show stability, but also change. Research indicates movement towards greater conscientiousness and agreeableness in adulthood, not just decline. Active engagement matters.
Greene's documented anti-Mexican rhetoric is clear. When public figures' alleged actions contradict stated positions, accountability is demanded.
In-person voter fraud is rare. Evidence shows strict voter ID laws primarily suppress votes, disproportionately affecting minority, elderly, & low-income voters.
